response.justification: Bogdan brings 25+ years of full-stack experience with a strong match on the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and explicitly mentions AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework development at re:cinq, which directly aligns with the role's AI agent requirement. His depth in testing culture (TDD practitioner, authored testing frameworks), cloud tooling (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), and polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, C++, DLang) speak to solid engineering fundamentals. The main gaps are the absence of Nest.js, Kotlin, Vitest, and Python anywhere in the resume, and PostgreSQL is not explicitly listed despite MongoDB and MySQL being present.
strengths: Direct AI agent development experience (MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq)
Deep, multi-decade full-stack background with TypeScript/Node.js/React and strong testing culture (TDD, authored D-lang testing frameworks)
Proven cloud and containerization experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) across multiple roles
concerns: Nest.js is completely absent from the resume — a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are not listed in skills or employment history, despite being required proficiencies
Specific JS testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) are not mentioned; testing experience is real but scoped to DLang tooling
